provenance.supersedes: Task5 question-state visible-text records only; all non-question prior oracle records remain authoritative
provenance.repair: Task5 question states used an object wrapper instead of the endpoint array contract; all timer/question-* records are replaced with current unchanged product rendering from corrected isolated loading/error/empty/array fixtures
provenance.modalIsolationRepair: Nested auction modal records replace Task5 parent-dialog text exposure after the intended aria-hidden/inert parent isolation; child visible copy is unchanged
provenance.drawRuntimeRepair: Embedded rolling/winner/repeat records replace Task5 stale settings-panel captures; the corrected harness closes settings before invoking the ArrowRight runtime shortcut
provenance.extensions: new Todo6 runtime states and 1280x600 low-height records were absent from the prior baseline and are established by this isolated current-revision run

independentProof.correctedQuestionFixtureContract: HTTP 200 JSON array of {number, personalSubmitted, topicSubmitted}; isolated loading delay, HTTP 500 error, and empty array variants
independentProof.proofIndependence: visible strings are read from pristine git source, not copied from current screenshot text arrays
